glosses.zh-Hans: 难以置信的; 不可思议的
glosses.yue: 難以置信的; 不可思議的
glosses.vi: khó tin; không thể tin nổi
glosses.ja: 信じられない; 信じがたい

translations.zh-Hans: 今天这个好吃得不得了。
translations.yue: 今日呢樣嘢好食到不得了。
translations.vi: Hôm nay món này ngon không tưởng.
translations.ar: اليوم هذا لذيذ بشكل لا يُصدق.
translations.nb: I dag er dette utrolig godt.
translations.sv: I dag är det här otroligt gott.
translations.ro: Astăzi asta e incredibil de bună.
translations.da: I dag er det her utroligt lækkert.
translations.ja: 今日はこれが信じられないくらいおいしい。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb specifying the time frame of the clause; modifies the overall predication.
Finite 3rd person singular present of 'sein' used as a copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Demonstrative pronoun (neuter, nominative) functioning as the subject; refers to a previously mentioned entity.
Degree adverb used as an intensifier; modifies the predicate adjective 'lecker'.
Predicate adjective serving as the predicative complement with the copula; denotes a quality of the subject.

translations.zh-Hans: 我觉得这美得不可思议。
translations.yue: 我覺得呢樣嘢靚到不得了。
translations.pt: Acho que isso é incrivelmente lindo.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy cái đó đẹp không tưởng.
translations.ar: أظن أن هذا جميل بشكل لا يُصدق.
translations.hi: मुझे लगता है यह बेहद खूबसूरत है.
translations.el: Πιστεύω ότι αυτό είναι απίστευτα όμορφο.
translations.nb: Jeg synes det er utrolig vakkert.
translations.id: Menurut saya itu luar biasa indah.
translations.sv: Jag tycker att det är otroligt vackert.
translations.ro: Cred că e incredibil de frumos.
translations.cs: Myslím, že je to neuvěřitelně krásné.
translations.da: Jeg synes, det er utrolig smukt.
translations.ja: それは信じられないくらいきれいだと思います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person singular, nominative) functioning as the subject of the clause.
Finite 1st person singular present of the lexical verb 'finden'; expresses an opinion/judgment and selects an object plus a predicative complement.
Demonstrative pronoun (neuter, accusative) serving as the direct object of 'finde'.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'schön'; forms part of the predicative complement.
Adjective functioning as an object-related predicative complement (what the speaker finds the object to be).

sentences.target: Im Kino war es gestern unglaublich laut.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈkiːno vaːʁ ɛs ʊnˈɡlaʊ̯plɪç laʊ̯t ˈɡɛstɐn/

translations.de: Im Kino war es unglaublich laut gestern.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈkiːno vaːʁ ɛs ʊnˈɡlaʊ̯plɪç laʊ̯t ˈɡɛstɐn/
translations.en: At the cinema, it was unbelievably loud yesterday.
translations.es: Ayer en el cine fue increíblemente ruidoso.
translations.fr: Hier au cinéma, c'était incroyablement bruyant.
translations.it: Ieri al cinema era incredibilmente rumoroso.
translations.zh-Hans: 昨天在电影院里声音大得离谱。
translations.yue: 尋日喺戲院度嘈到不得了。
translations.ru: Вчера в кино было невероятно громко.
translations.pt: Ontem no cinema estava incrivelmente barulhento.
translations.vi: Hôm qua ở rạp phim ồn không tưởng.
translations.ar: أمس في السينما كان الصوت عالياً بشكل لا يُصدق.
translations.nl: Gisteren in de bioscoop was het ongelooflijk luidruchtig.
translations.uk: Учора в кіно було неймовірно гучно.
translations.hu: Tegnap a moziban hihetetlenül hangos volt.
translations.hi: कल सिनेमा में आवाज़ बेहद तेज़ थी.
translations.pl: Wczoraj w kinie było niewiarygodnie głośno.
translations.el: Χτές στο σινεμά ήταν απίστευτα δυνατά.
translations.nb: I går på kino var det utrolig høyt.
translations.id: Kemarin di bioskop suaranya kencang banget.
translations.sv: I går på bio var det otroligt högt.
translations.ro: Ieri la cinema a fost incredibil de gălăgios.
translations.cs: Včera v kině to bylo neuvěřitelně hlasité.
translations.da: I går i biografen var det utrolig højt.
translations.ja: 昨日映画館は信じられないほどうるさかった。

tokens.explanation: Preposition 'in' fused with the definite article 'dem' (dative); introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun (dative singular) governed by the preposition; denotes the location.
Finite 3rd person singular preterite of 'sein' used as a copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Personal/impersonal pronoun (3rd person neuter, nominative) functioning as the subject.
Temporal adverb specifying when the state held; modifies the clause.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective 'laut'.
Predicate adjective describing the state; serves as predicative complement with the copula.

sentences.target: Die Rechnung ist unglaublich hoch geworden.

translations.de: Die Rechnung ist unglaublich hoch geworden.
translations.en: The bill has become unbelievably high.
translations.es: La cuenta ha salido increíblemente cara.
translations.it: Il conto è diventato incredibilmente caro.
translations.ko: 금액이 믿기지 않을 만큼 높게 나왔어요.
translations.vi: Hóa đơn này đắt không tưởng.
translations.ar: الفاتورة أصبحت غالية بشكل لا يُصدق.
translations.nl: De rekening is ongelooflijk hoog geworden.
translations.hi: बिल बहुत महँगा हो गया है.
translations.ro: Nota a ajuns incredibil de mare.
translations.ja: 請求額が信じられないほど高くなった。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (feminine, nominative singular) marking definiteness of the head noun.
Common noun (feminine, nominative singular) functioning as the subject.
Finite 3rd person singular present of 'sein' functioning as perfect auxiliary forming the present perfect with 'geworden'.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective 'hoch'.
Predicate adjective expressing the resultant state/quality; serves as complement to the change-of-state verb.
Past participle of the lexical verb 'werden' forming a present perfect construction with 'sein'; denotes a change of state.
